title: Final integration — update CommunityGraph with ExportFormat + full test suite
acceptance_criteria: CommunityGraph.hs refactored to use ExportFormat type class instead of direct format knowledge
Each export format (HTML, JSON, Neo4j, Obsidian, SVG, GraphML) implements ExportFormat
UseCase.Export updated to use type class dispatch
cabal test passes (full suite, zero failures)
All re-export hubs verified (Domain.Types, Domain.Graph, LSP.Client, UseCase.Extract still importable)
No IO in Domain or UseCase layers
New modules added to test suite where appropriate
